what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for an image asset named p-25 in the design-source channel under recent-pitches, declaring its id, address, blob reference, MIME type, authorship, creation time, and an empty link set, plus a one-line body label calling it design ground-truth.
observations: YAML frontmatter with image asset metadata
id is recent-pitches/p-25 and address uses image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-25
mime is image/jpeg but w and h are both 0
source is design_source_material and author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
Body line reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — recent-pitches/p-25.jpg'
standouts: Image dimensions w and h are 0 despite mime image/jpeg
Blob reference is present but no inline image or preview
No outgoing links to related pitches or designs
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a fixed schema of id/address/channel/path/blob/mime/name/w/h/source/author_session/created/links
References media by blob URI and channel path
Body provides a human-readable source label
concerns: Zero width and height for an image/jpeg record suggests missing or unextracted dimensions
No descriptive caption or alt text for the image
No links to contextualize which pitch or design this image supports
Created date is in the future relative to typical current time
notes: A sparse ledger stub for a design-source pitch image that has a blob pointer and provenance but no dimensions, links, or visual description.
questions: Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
What visual content does p-25.jpg actually contain?
How is the blob blob://b2:... stored and verified?
Which pitch or design artifact does this image ground-truth belong to?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to record SOURCE design ground-truth for a recent-pitches image; actual content is a metadata-only stub with no pixel data, dimensions, or descriptive content, so it catalogs provenance but does not itself serve as viewable ground-truth.
intention_signals: The file appears to be trying to register a specific pitch image in the design-source channel as authoritative source material, capturing its identity, storage blob, author session, and creation time for later retrieval or audit.
novelty: The use of a channel-memory ledger file with a blob:// URI and structured frontmatter to catalog a design image, combined with explicit 'SOURCE design ground-truth' labeling, is distinct; the zero-dimension image record is unusual.
contribution: Contributes a metadata anchor for a specific design-source pitch image, preserving its blob pointer, MIME type, authorship session, creation timestamp, source lineage, and an explicit ground-truth label that a fused system could use to resolve or verify the underlying image asset.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory ledger stub for the design-source image recent-pitches/p-25.jpg, referencing blob b2:3394ff2da58713bd6c3601e5b4184bc5 with provenance fields and zero dimensions.
intention_for_embedding: This file was intended to register a recent pitch image as design-source ground-truth material with a persistent blob reference and authorship metadata.
